findings.title: Reference decision gate is absent from working package
findings.summary: A required PAF decision gate is not represented in the working package.
findings.recommendation: Restore the missing gate or document why the working package intentionally excludes it.

findings.title: Reference criterion is materially reworded
findings.summary: The working package changes the meaning of a reference criterion.
findings.recommendation: Align wording with the reference criterion.

findings.title: Reference workflow is too implicit
findings.summary: The working package mentions the workflow but does not package it into actionable operator steps.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit steps or acceptance criteria.

findings.title: Packaged method has no observed activation path
findings.summary: A method exists in the working package but no setup or runtime instruction appears to call it.
findings.recommendation: Confirm whether this method is intentionally dormant.

findings.title: Working package adds a stricter rule than reference
findings.summary: A strict requirement appears without a matching PAF source.
findings.recommendation: Either cite the source or relax the strict requirement.

findings.title: Local adaptation may be valid but needs owner judgment
findings.summary: The working package adapts a reference idea for the CPO context.
findings.recommendation: Ask the methodology owner whether this adaptation is intended.

findings.title: Evidence is insufficient for automated classification
findings.summary: The model cannot distinguish missing context from a real methodology issue.
findings.recommendation: Keep as human-review input, not a blocking automated signal.

non_findings.title: Reference checklist is compressed without meaning loss
non_findings.summary: The working package compresses a checklist while preserving the decision logic.

limitations: Golden fixture uses sanitized excerpts only.
recommended_human_review: Review the blocking lost-methodology signal before merge.
